title: SAO collapse remains unresolved
desc: One year after the collapse of the State Audit Office's (SAO) new headquarters in Bangkok's Chatuchak district on March 28, 2025, Thailand is still searching for answers -- not only about what caused the building to fall, but also about the deeper systemic failures the disaster exposed.

title: Diesel tax to drop by 1 baht per litre
desc: The government is preparing to reduce the excise tax on diesel by one baht per litre, aiming to ease the rising cost burden on consumers, even though the move is expected to cost the state up to 2 billion baht per month.

title: Govt prepares co-payment scheme to ease living costs
desc: The government plans to launch the "Khon La Khrueng" co-payment scheme to help ease the rising cost of living, with rollout expected after it delivers its policy statement to parliament.

title: Bangladesh seeks to build on existing ties, eyes trade deal
desc: The new government in Bangladesh is seeking to deepen its engagement with Thailand and Asean, which may include the signing of a free trade agreement (FTA) and the establishment of direct maritime connectivity, Faiyaz Murshid Kazi, Bangladesh's ambassador to Thailand, says.

title: Fuel support starts April 1
desc: The government will roll out targeted fuel subsidies for the transport sector from April 1, Transport Minister Phiphat Ratchakitprakarn has confirmed, as operators grapple with mounting costs and looming freight rate increases.

title: Bangkok Airways to raise domestic airfares by up to 20%
desc: SET-listed Bangkok Airways plans to increase domestic airfares by 15-20% from April 1 to counter rising fuel costs and a 3% decline in second-quarter forward bookings, and may negotiate with the Civil Aviation Authority of Thailand (CAAT) to extend the airfare ceiling if operating costs continue to soar.

title: Sethaput named as councillor
desc: Sethaput Suthiwartnarueput, a former governor of the Bank of Thailand (BoT), has been appointed a Privy Councillor following a royal command announced in the Royal Gazette on Thursday.

title: Thailand mulls windfall tax on oil refineries
desc: The Fiscal Policy Office (FPO) has acknowledged it is studying the feasibility of introducing a windfall tax on refinery businesses in Thailand.

title: Forum backs arbitration policy reform
desc: The Thai Arbitration Institute (THAC) under the Ministry of Justice has wrapped up its THAC Leader Forum for Public Policy on Trade, Investment and Alternative Dispute Resolution 2026.

title: Modernising Mexican groove
desc: The Mexican Institute of Sound (MIS), founded in 2004 by Mexico City-based DJ and record producer Camilo Lara, is a project to bring together fusions of folk and traditional music with digital production and electronica. MIS started as a side project, based on Lara's own remixing of popular tracks.

title: Fever pitch
desc: Film buffs around the world were recently glued to the live Oscars celebration and as always, there was a comedian as host, and jokes flew thick and fast.

title: An elegy to lost worlds
desc: A large, booming presence as bureau chief of the Associated Press in Bangkok for more than 30 years, a war reporter in Indochina before that, thrice president of the Foreign Correspondents Club of Thailand, Denis Gray has through six turbulent decades occupied front row seats, and foxholes, to report on some of the most violent upheavals of our times.

title: Inheriting the brush
desc: At first glance, a mural resembles a familiar backdrop to an ubosot at any temple. You expect it to depict themes from the Jataka Tales and the Tripitaka to legends and folklore. But upon closer look, it reveals something different -- it is deeply personal, vernacular and subversive of gender norms.

title: Communities are the new  brand currency
desc: People are gravitating towards communities. Whether this is a shared love or appreciation for trendy, aesthetically appealing racquet sports, or teaming up for intense Hyrox competitions, there's a shift happening across cultural touchpoints.

title: Project Hail Mary: Two friends, one universe
desc: I never imagined that Sign of the Times could fit so perfectly and hauntingly into a sci-fi film about the end of the world. Like the song, Project Hail Mary (2026) is a slow burn, visually spectacular and, importantly, a moving story simply about a relationship bound by world-ending...

title: Free electric coaches ease travel costs in Chiang Rai
desc: CHIANG RAI - Chiang Rai municipality has launched a free electric coach service to help residents cope with rising fuel prices and limited supply, with the vehicles running throughout the day on routes that cover key areas of the northern city.

title: Oil checks in seven provinces find ‘no irregularities’
desc: Inspections of oil depots and petrol stations in seven provinces have found no irregularities in fuel supply or distribution, the National Economic and Social Development Council (NESDC) said on Friday.

title: Fares for Pattaya-Koh Larn ferries going up
desc: Operators of ferries between Pattaya and Koh Larn, a nearby island popular with day-trippers, say they will raise their fares from 30 baht to 40 baht next month, citing rising fuel costs that have made it difficult to sustain operations.

title: Dhammajayo case dropped as statute of limitations expires
desc: The Department of Special Investigation (DSI) has formally dropped criminal proceedings against Phra Dhammajayo, the former abbot of Wat Phra Dhammakaya, after the statute of limitations in the high‑profile money‑laundering case expired earlier this month.

title: Bangkok Pride Festival on May 31
desc: The Bangkok Pride Festival 2026, themed “Patch The World With Pride”, conveying a message of peace and inclusivity amid global conflict, will take place on May 31, as Thailand will make a bid to host World Pride 2030 at the International Pride Conference in Phuket in October.

title: Guru's Weekly Buzz: Mar 27-Apr 2
desc: Guru By Bangkok Post's weekly pick of the most exciting products, activities, food and travel to indulge in.

title: Pheu Thai cabinet hopeful Sudawan fails screening check
desc: Pheu Thai Party deputy leader Sudawan Wangsuphakitkosol, tipped to take one of the party’s eight cabinet seats in the Bhumjaithai-led coalition government, has failed to meet required qualifications.

title: Japan approves plan for overtourism measures in 100 areas by 2030
desc: The Japanese government on Friday approved its next basic tourism plan including steps to bring the number of areas with measures against overtourism to 100 by 2030, the first time it has set a target on the issue.

title: Your horoscope for Mar 27 - April 2
desc: Your spot-on horoscope for work, money and relationship from Guru by the Bangkok Post's famously accurate fortune teller. Let's see how you will fare this week and beyond.

title: Thai factory output unexpectedly dips in February, could rise in March
desc: Thailand's manufacturing production ​index dropped 0.04% in February from a year ​earlier, the Industry Ministry ‌said on Friday, weaker than analysts' forecasts.

title: Vietnam suspends some fuel taxes to stabilise domestic market
desc: HANOI - Vietnam's Finance Ministry said on ​Friday it ‌has suspended environmental protection and special consumption taxes on fuels to stabilise the domestic market.

title: 泰国警方突击两大仓库，查获2500余架无人机
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 3月26日，泰国技术犯罪调查总部联合国家广播电信委员会第一区域办公室等部门，开展代号为“Crack down Drone outlaws”的联合执法行动。执法人员依据民事法院米奴府发出的搜查令，对位于曼谷的两处非法无人机销售仓库进行突击搜查，查获大量非法进口无人机。 行动中，执法人员首先对位于拉差巴里区Pra Thep Ratmori 6巷的1049/10号和1169/2号仓库展开搜查。现场发现，两处仓库规模较大，内部存放自中国进口的多种货物，包括日用品、食品及各类电子设备。执法人员共查获非法进口无人机2500余架，总价值超过500万泰铢。 泰国技术犯罪调查总部总指挥素拉蓬表示，调查发现部分商家通过社交平台非法销售从国外进口的无人机，此类行为可能对国家安全、社会秩序及公共安全构成潜在威胁。国家广播电信委员会第一区域办公室在行动中提供了相关线上商家信息，经核实后，执法人员依法扣押全部涉案物品。 技术犯罪调查总部副总指挥维瓦特进一步指出，所有查获物品将依法扣押，相关部门将继续追查涉案责任人。初步认定，相关行为涉嫌违反《无线电通信法（2498年）》第6条，即未经许可制造、使用、进口、出口或销售无线电通信设备，同时涉嫌违反《海关法》第246条，即帮助隐匿、销售或运输未完成海关手续的货物。根据法律规定，违法者可被处以最高5年监禁、最高10万泰铢罚款，或两者并罚。 （编译：W

title: 霍尔木兹海峡紧张，泰国及多国抢购俄罗斯原油
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 据路透社报道，多方消息人士及俄方相关人士透露，受霍尔木兹海峡紧张局势影响，石油出口受阻，包括越南、泰国、菲律宾、印度尼西亚、斯里兰卡在内的多个亚洲国家近期积极寻求采购俄罗斯原油。市场分析认为，此举或将使全球原油需求超过现有供给能力。 自乌克兰危机升级以来，曾为俄罗斯原油和天然气最大买家的欧洲国家大幅削减采购量，印度与中国因此成为俄原油主要进口国，合计约占俄罗斯原油出口总量的80%。此外，土耳其也是重要买家之一。近几周来，多个亚洲国家进一步加大了对俄罗斯原油的采购力度。 俄罗斯总统新闻秘书德米特里·佩斯科夫表示，来自新兴市场的原油需求持续走高，已接近甚至可能超过俄罗斯的供给能力。他指出，当前中东局势持续紧张，美国与以色列同伊朗之间的冲突已对霍尔木兹海峡航运构成威胁，全球约五分之一的石油产量面临运输受阻风险。 受国际油价上涨及美国对部分俄罗斯油轮实施为期30天的临时豁免措施影响，俄方可通过海上渠道继续开展原油销售。石油与天然气相关收入约占俄罗斯政府预算的四分之一。但受乌克兰无人机袭击等因素影响，俄方约40%的出口能力受到干扰，出口增量空间受限。 据伦敦证券交易所集团（LSEG）数据显示，菲律宾自俄罗斯远东地区采购约150万桶原油，由油轮“Sara Sky”号和“Tiger Wings”号运抵该国利巴伊港，用于巴塔安炼油厂储备。这是菲律宾时隔五年再次进口俄罗斯原油。 泰

title: Italian drug user arrested on Kon Chang after argument with Thai wife
desc: Italian drug user arrested on Kon Chang after argument with Thai wife Legacy Koh Chang police arrested an Italian man for drug use today, March 27, after a caretaker at his rented house called officers to intervene in a violent argument between him and his Thai wife . Koh Chang Police Station officers were called to the couple’s home at about 9.50am and found them arguing outside the accommodation. Police identified the Italian man as Giovanni Leano Candido and his wife as 36 year old Bang-on Suphawadee. According to the Crime Asia Facebook page, Bang-on told police her husband appeared to be

title: British mother seeks woman seen with son before his death in Bangkok hotel
desc: British mother seeks woman seen with son before his death in Bangkok hotel Legacy A British mother is trying to identify and contact a foreign woman who was seen with her son , Joshua Kershaw , shortly before he was found dead at a hotel in Sukhumvit area of Bangkok in January. The family of 21 year old British man Joshua began searching for him on social media after losing contact on January 12. Joshua spoke to his mother, Jenny Kershaw, after arriving at a hotel on Soi Sukhumvit 7/1 and told her he planned to continue travelling to Pattaya . Joshua ended the call, telling his mother he was g

title: Bangkok warehouse raid uncovers thousands of smuggled drones
desc: Bangkok warehouse raid uncovers thousands of smuggled drones Legacy Cyber police and relevant officials raided two locations in Bangkok yesterday, March 26, as part of an operation dubbed “Crack down Drone outlaws”, seizing more than 2,500 drones smuggled into Thailand and sold online. According to police, the searches were carried out under a Min Buri Criminal Court warrant linked to the suspected illegal sale of drones, or unmanned aircraft, on social media platforms. Though two locations were searched, reports only provided details of one of the sites. One of the locations was a large wareh

title: 对标上海迪士尼，泰国或迎东盟首座迪士尼乐园
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 3月27日，据泰媒报道，泰国副总理兼交通部长皮帕透露，政府正重点推动在东部经济走廊（EEC）引入迪士尼乐园等世界级主题乐园项目，计划落地面积约3000莱（合4.8平方千米），作为EEC新城项目的一部分。若项目成功启动，这将成为东盟首个迪士尼乐园，也是亚洲第四座迪士尼乐园。 皮帕表示，在新一届政府完成组建后，将重点推进EEC发展项目，其中世界级主题乐园是核心内容之一。目前已与外国投资方进行对接，包括来自阿联酋阿布扎比的一位投资人对在泰国投资建设主题乐园表现出浓厚兴趣。政府近期已主动与迪士尼方面接触，并向华特迪士尼公司新任首席执行官戴明哲（Josh D’Amaro）发出贺信，祝贺其于3月18日正式上任，同时表达欢迎其访问泰国的意愿。 皮帕指出，此前已有多家国际大型主题乐园运营商与泰国方面接洽，但政府重点仍在推动迪士尼项目。目前已有来自中东的资本有意参与投资建设，在当前国际局势下，预计将有更多投资者关注该项目。政府预计，到2026年底将可明确迪士尼是否落地泰国；若项目启动，建设周期预计约4年。 在投资规模方面，初步评估仅迪士尼乐园部分的投资额就可能达到1000亿至2000亿泰铢，目标是打造与上海迪士尼乐园同等规模的项目。一旦落地，这将成为东盟首个迪士尼乐园，也是亚洲第四座迪士尼乐园，仅次于日本、中国香港和中国上海。 此外，该项目还将配套建设大型体育综合体，包括一座可容纳

title: Phuket man arrested for groping 4 Thai and foreign women
desc: Phuket man arrested for groping 4 Thai and foreign women Legacy Police arrested a Thai man for sexually assaulting at least four women in the Chalong area of Phuket throughout March. Chalong Police Station said it received four reports of sexual assault from four victims, including Thai and foreign nationals. Police said the incidents caused fear in the area, and some victims were injured while trying to break free from the suspect. According to police, the victims gave similar descriptions of the attacker, saying he was slim, dark-skinned and had a shaved head. They also reported that he rode

title: Tourist says they fear dogs, not humans, when walking on Thai streets
desc: Tourist says they fear dogs, not humans, when walking on Thai streets Legacy A foreign tourist has shared a video comparing walking safety in California and Thailand , saying she felt less concerned about people in Thailand but stayed alert for dogs that might chase her on the street. In the clip, the tourist described what she called the “main differences between California and Thailand” when walking outdoors. She said that in the United States , she had to keep looking over her shoulder to watch out for people, while in Thailand, she was not worried about people and instead focused on dogs,

title: 曼谷太能打！9家餐厅杀入亚洲50最佳，两家冲进前五
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 近日，国际餐饮权威榜单“2026亚洲50最佳餐厅”（Asia’s 50 Best Restaurants 2026）正式公布。根据官方榜单，泰国共有9家餐厅跻身前50强，全部位于曼谷，再次彰显曼谷作为亚洲高端餐饮重镇的强劲实力。 在本届榜单中，来自曼谷的Gaggan位列亚洲第3位，成为泰国排名最高的餐厅；紧随其后的是Nusara，排名第5位。此外，曼谷多家知名精致餐厅持续稳居榜单，显示出泰国高端餐饮在亚洲范围内依然保持强劲竞争力。 本次进入亚洲前50的泰国餐厅分别为： 第3名 Gaggan 第5名 Nusara 第8名 Gaggan at Louis Vuitton 第12名 Sorn 第18名 Sühring 第25名 Potong 第27名 Ms. Maria & Mr. Singh 第36名 Le Du 第47名 Wana Yook 此外，在延伸榜单中，Baan Tepa位列第53名，Samrub Samrub Thai 位列第67名。 根据官方榜单，2026亚洲50最佳餐厅前十名分别为： 1.The Chairman（香港） 2.Wing（香港） 3.Gaggan（曼谷） 4.Mingles（首尔） 5.Nusara（曼谷） 6.Meet the Bund（上海） 7.Chef Tam’s Seasons（澳门） 8.Gaggan at Louis

title: 人口统计最新数据出炉！泰国人口持续下滑
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 近日，泰国内政部行政厅公布全国最新人口统计数据。截至2025年12月31日，泰国全国人口总数为 65809011人，较2024年的 65951210人 减少约 142199人，人口持续呈下降趋势。 统计显示，全国人口中，泰国籍人口为 64820708人，非泰国籍人口为 988620人。 根据统计，全国人口数量最多的10个府（含泰国籍及非泰国籍）分别为： 曼谷 —— 5422568人 呵叻府 —— 2613132人 乌汶府 —— 1865501人 清迈府 —— 1798588人 孔敬府 —— 1785462人 春武里府 —— 1618485人 武里南府 —— 1570279人 乌隆府 —— 1556337人 洛坤府 —— 1540132人 四色菊府 —— 1452941人 数据显示，首都曼谷仍是人口最多的地区，人口数量约为排名第二的呵叻府的两倍。同时，人口排名前十的府区中，大多数位于泰国东北部地区，显示该地区人口基数较大。 官方表示，将持续关注人口变化趋势，以评估其对经济、社会及劳动力结构带来的影响。 （编译：jinda；审校：wan；来源：matichon） The post 人口统计最新数据出炉！泰国人口持续下滑 appeared first on 泰国头条新闻 .

title: DSI ends proceedings against ex-abbot of Phra Dhammakaya Temple
desc: DSI ends proceedings against ex-abbot of Phra Dhammakaya Temple Legacy The Department of Special Investigation (DSI) announced the terminated legal proceedings against the former abbot of Phra Dhammakaya Temple in Pathum Thani and the owner of the Victoria’s Secret massage parlour in Bangkok. The former abbot, Chaiyabun Suddhipol, better known as Luang Por Dhammajayo , was accused of money laundering and receiving stolen goods after funds described as illegal were found to have been transferred to the temple during his leadership. The allegations were linked to the Klongchan Credit Union Coope

title: 瞄准芯片产业机遇，BOI赴上海吸引全球芯片企业落地泰国
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 近日，泰国投资促进委员会（BOI）赴中国上海参加全球半导体行业盛会 SEMICON China 2026，向国际企业展示泰国作为区域半导体生产基地的潜力，积极吸引龙头企业赴泰投资，推动完善产业供应链，目标打造“泰国制造”芯片产业体系。 BOI秘书长纳立表示，BOI于2026年3月25日至26日在上海开展投资推介活动，并与泰国半导体产业协会共同参加SEMICON China 2026。该展会是全球半导体领域的重要会议和展览，涵盖从芯片设计、晶圆制造到封装测试的完整产业链。 在会议上，泰方介绍了泰国发展半导体产业的战略方向及政策支持措施，强调泰国具备成为区域重要生产基地的条件，包括完善的基础设施、不断发展的供应链体系以及政府推动的人才培养计划。政府正按照国家半导体产业战略，推动形成从设计、制造到先进封装测试的完整产业生态，为产业长期发展奠定基础。 本次会议还汇集了来自新加坡、马来西亚、菲律宾和越南等国的投资促进机构及科技组织代表，各方就东南亚半导体产业发展前景进行交流，探讨加强区域合作，推动东盟成为全球芯片产业的重要基地。 在活动期间，BOI与5家半导体行业领先企业举行会谈，包括全球领先的封装测试企业长电科技、具备完整制造能力的中科芯、中国EDA软件龙头华大九天、半导体设备制造商北方华创以及电路光刻设备企业芯碁微装。会谈重点围绕推动企业在泰国投资生产、加强供应链合作及

title: Screams heard during hunt for woman carried uphill, no trace found
desc: Screams heard during hunt for woman carried uphill, no trace found Legacy Rescue workers and police launched a search for a missing woman at Khao Song Phi Nong in Chon Buri after a resident reported seeing two men carrying an unconscious woman uphill and returning without her on March 26. The Sawang Boriboon Thammasathan Pattaya team said locals reported the incident over concerns the woman may have been harmed. Volunteers coordinated with Bang Lamung police and checked the area. At the scene, an assistant village head and more than 10 villagers gathered to discuss what had happened. A Myanmar

title: British and Irish riders arrested in Phuket after viral wheelie video
desc: British and Irish riders arrested in Phuket after viral wheelie video Legacy Police arrested an Irish and a British motorcyclist after they were filmed performing wheelies on a public road in Phuket on March 25. The Facebook page โหดจัง จังหวัดภูเก็ต posted a video showing a foreign man in a blue shirt riding along Chao Fah Tawan Tok Road in Chalong subdistrict. The post included the caption: “Do you think that this is a race track? Don’t know what to say. This is dangerous for other motorists!” In the footage, the rider lifts the front wheel while travelling in the left lane before cutt

title: 重磅任命！泰国前央行行长获任枢密院大臣
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 据泰媒报道，3月26日，泰国政宪公报网站发布国王御令，正式任命前央行行长塞塔普为新任枢密院大臣，自当日起生效。 根据公告，泰国国王玛哈·哇集拉隆功陛下依据2017年版《泰王国宪法》第10条和第11条之规定，御准增补塞塔普为枢密院成员。此前枢密院大臣的任命已于2023年11月29日公告，此次为根据工作需要进行的增补。 公开资料显示，塞塔普出生于1965年，自幼随家庭在海外生活，曾在法国完成中学教育，后赴美国深造，毕业于斯沃斯莫尔学院，并在耶鲁大学获得经济学硕士和博士学位。其职业生涯起步于麦肯锡纽约分公司，随后进入世界银行担任高级经济学家。1997年亚洲金融危机期间回到泰国，参与财政政策研究工作，之后再次回到世界银行任职。 2005年后，塞塔普在泰国证券交易所、泰国商业银行及财政部等机构担任要职，并参与多家大型企业及金融机构的董事会工作，同时担任泰国央行董事及货币政策委员会委员。2020年10月起，他出任泰国央行第24任行长，任期至2025年9月。卸任后被任命为王室财产管理机构顾问。2026年3月26日，正式获御准任命为枢密院大臣。 （编译：Juliette；审校：WAN；来源：bangkokbiznews、thairath） The post 重磅任命！泰国前央行行长获任枢密院大臣 appeared first on 泰国头条新闻 .

title: Couple allegedly beaten by 50 men at Samut Prakan gambling den
desc: Couple allegedly beaten by 50 men at Samut Prakan gambling den Legacy A man asked the Sai Mai Must Survive page for help yesterday, March 26, alleging he and his girlfriend were assaulted by a group of more than 50 men inside an illegal gambling den in Samut Prakan , leaving them seriously injured. At 2.30pm, 33 year old Somboon filed a complaint with Ekaphop Lueangprasert, founder of the Sai Mai Must Survive page , after the alleged assault.
